title: Civic Urbanism in Latin America: Policies and Implementations
abstract: An analysis of policy transfer regarding civic space and participatory governance in Bogota and Lima.

title: Climate Adaptation in Andean Cities
abstract: This paper examines resilient infrastructure and mitigation techniques applied in high-altitude dense urban centers.

title: Micro-mobility and The 15-Minute City in Brazil
abstract: A comprehensive survey covering bike-sharing adoption and pedestrian networks across 5 metropolitan areas in Brazil.
